title: delphinium parryi f. maritimum
intro: Delphinium parryi f. maritimum, also known as the coastal delphinium or maritime larkspur, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the delphinium genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce vomiting and relieve respiratory issues. The coastal delphinium has been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health problems, including colds, fever, and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Delphinium parryi f. maritimum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support respiratory health and relieve coughs.
